# Mooring Analysis Results

Mooring analysis results include line tensions and vessel offsets.

## Line Tensions

| Result variable | Units | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Effective tension | kN | Axial force along the line |
| Bend moment | kNm | Bending moment at section |
| Shear force | kN | Transverse shear force |

## Vessel Offsets

| DOF | Max offset | Mean offset |
|---|---|---|
| Surge (m) | 12.3 | 5.2 |
| Sway (m) | 8.7 | 1.1 |
